spec.description: Monitoring vLLM Inference Server
Mean inter token latency in seconds.
spec.title: Inter Token Latency

spec.description: Number of finished requests by their finish reason: either an EOS token was generated or the max sequence length was reached.
spec.title: Finish Reason

spec.description: Rate of requests preempted by the scheduler (KV cache pressure or priority).
spec.title: Preemptions

spec.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
or
(sum by(model_name) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) * 0)

spec.description: P50 end to end request latency in seconds.
spec.title: E2E Request Latency

spec.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le, model_name) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])))
or
(sum by(model_name) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) * 0)

spec.description: P50 TTFT latency in seconds.
spec.title: Time To First Token Latency

or
(sum by(model_name) (rate(vllm:inter_token_latency_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", model_name=~"$model_name"}[$__rate_interval])) * 0)
